question: How often do you review study material after your first learning session?
How often do you revisit the same material after increasing time intervals (e.g., 1 day, 3 days, 1 week)?
How often do you use spaced repetition techniques (planned review schedule)?
How often do you forget information shortly after studying it?
How often do you use flashcards for reviewing information?
How often do you test yourself instead of just rereading notes?
How often do you schedule your study sessions in advance?
How often do you feel that repeated reviews improve your memory?
How often do you rely on cramming instead of spaced learning?
How often do you remember information weeks after learning it?
How often do you use apps for spaced repetition?
How often do you review difficult topics more frequently than easy ones?
How often do you track your learning progress over time?
How often do you feel confident recalling information without notes?
How often do you adjust your review schedule based on your memory performance?
